titleStmt.title: SII 38.209: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 209. (A.R. No. 209 of 1912.) TIRUVOṞṞIYŪR, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the north wall, first prākāra, Ādhipurīśvara temple.

p.hi: King: Tribhuvanachakravartin Kōnērinmaikoṇḍāṉ (Tribhuvanavīra Kulōttuṅga III) Year 27: 69th day = 1205 A.D.

summary.p: Contains a royal order, addressed to the priests and officials of the temple at Tiruvoṟṟiyūr in Vikramachōḷa-vaḷanāḍu alias Puḻaṟ-kōṭṭam, issued in the year 27 giving effect to an order issued by the king on the day of Vishu in the month of Chittirai in the year 26. It records a gift of 100 vēli of land as dēvadāna-iṟaiyili at Kuḷappākkam alias Śivapādaśēkharanallūr in Kulōttuṅgachōḻa-maṇḍalam alias Puliyūr-kōṭṭam. The gift was made in order to meet the expenses for a special service Tribhuvanavīran-sandhi, instituted in the name of the king to be celebrated in the temple (from the 27th regnal year of the king). The document was attested by the royal secretary, (tirumandiraōlai) Mīnavan Mūvēndavēḷāṉ and other officials.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
tirumukappaṭi ÷ svastiśrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravatti koṉeriṉmai koṇṭāṉ jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattup puḻaṟkoṭṭamāṉa vikkiramacoḻavaḷaṉāṭṭu
Uṭaiyār tiruvoṟṟiyūruṭaiyār koyilil patipātamulap paṭṭuṭaip pañcācāriyattevakaṉmikkum śrīmāheśvarakaṇkāṇi ceyvārkaḷukkum śrīkāriyamcey
vāṉukkum Ittevarkkut tiripuvaṉavīraṉcantiyeṉṟu Oru canti putitākak kāṇavum Itukku veṇṭuvaṉavaiyiṟṟukku Uṭalāka Irupattāṟāvatu cittiraiviṣuvil
tevatāṉaiṟaiyiliyiṭa nām nirvārttanilattukkup puliyūr koṭṭamāṉa kulottuṅkacoḻavaḷaṉāṭṭuk kuḷappākkamāṉa civapātacekaranallūrile nūṟṟuveli nila
m Irupatteḻāvatu mutal tevatāṉaiṟaiyiliyāka Iṭavum kaṭavatākac colli Ippaṭi kaṇakkilum Iṭṭukkoḷḷak kaṭavarkaḷāka varikkūṟu ceyvārkaḷukkum coṉ
ṉom Iṉṉilam Irupatteḻāvatu mutal tevatāṉaiṟaiyiliyākak kaikkoṇṭu nivantañ celuttap paṇṇuka Eḻutiṉāṉ tirumantiravolai miṉavaṉ muventaveḷāṉ
Ivai villavarāyaṉeḻuttu Ivai viḻiñattaraiyaṉeḻuttu Ivai viḻuppātarāyaṉeḻuttu Ivai ciṅkaḷarāyaṉeḻuttu Ivai toṇṭaimāṉeḻuttu Ivai
Aṅkaḷarāyaṉeḻuttu Ivai cetikularāyaṉeḻuttu Ivai nilakaṅ(kaṅ)kaiyaṉeḻuttuRead nilakaṅkaraiyaṉeḻuttunāḷ 6 10 9
Digital edition of SII 38.209 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
